metadata.title: Sophia Forge
metadata.description: The studio operations platform built for your studio.

hero.headline: Forge your pipeline.
hero.subline: The studio operations platform built for your studio.

what.body: Sophia Forge is the operations layer your studio is missing. Asset management, task tracking, real-time collaboration, and AI-powered workflows — all connected, all coherent, all in one place.

features.asset_sync_desc: UE5 String Tables, Data Tables, and Actor Assemblies — live.
features.task_tracking_desc: Production pipelines built for how game teams actually work.
features.collaboration_desc: Your whole studio, in sync, without the chaos.
features.ai_workflows_desc: Intelligent orchestration that handles the overhead for you.
features.ue5_desc: Full native integration. Our first and deepest engine support.
features.more_engines_desc: Other engines and custom pipelines on the roadmap.

quote.text: Every feature in Sophia Forge exists because I needed it. Built in production. Tested in production. Shipped to you.
quote.author: Jessyka Gavião

waitlist.headline: Be first.
waitlist.subline: Sophia Forge is launching soon. Join the waitlist for early access, pricing updates, and launch news.
